subcodes.first_line: A Book sent down in truth from God, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting. Verily, it is the supreme testimony amongst all peoples and the Sign [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل بالحق من لدی الله المهیمن القیوم انه لحجه الکبری بین الوری و الایه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @exhortations and counsels, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
